;;;1335     assert_param(IS_TIM_AUTORELOAD_PRELOAD(htim->Init.AutoReloadPreload));
;;;1336   
;;;1337     if (htim->State == HAL_TIM_STATE_RESET)
000006  f894003d          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x3d]
00000a  b110              CBZ      r0,|L78.18|
00000c  e007              B        |L78.30|
                  |L78.14|
00000e  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;1327
;;;1338     {
;;;1339       /* Allocate lock resource and initialize it */
;;;1340       htim->Lock = HAL_UNLOCKED;
;;;1341   
;;;1342   #if (USE_HAL_TIM_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
;;;1343       /* Reset interrupt callbacks to legacy weak callbacks */
;;;1344       TIM_ResetCallback(htim);
;;;1345   
;;;1346       if (htim->PWM_MspInitCallback == NULL)
;;;1347       {
;;;1348         htim->PWM_MspInitCallback = HAL_TIM_PWM_MspInit;
;;;1349       }
;;;1350       /* Init the low level hardware : GPIO, CLOCK, NVIC */
;;;1351       htim->PWM_MspInitCallback(htim);
;;;1352   #else
;;;1353       /* Init the low level hardware : GPIO, CLOCK, NVIC and DMA */
;;;1354       HAL_TIM_PWM_MspInit(htim);
;;;1355   #endif /* USE_HAL_TIM_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
;;;1356     }
;;;1357   
;;;1358     /* Set the TIM state */
;;;1359     htim->State = HAL_TIM_STATE_BUSY;
;;;1360   
;;;1361     /* Init the base time for the PWM */
;;;1362     TIM_Base_SetConfig(htim->Instance, &htim->Init);
;;;1363   
;;;1364     /* Initialize the DMA burst operation state */
;;;1365     htim->DMABurstState = HAL_DMA_BURST_STATE_READY;
;;;1366   
;;;1367     /* Initialize the TIM channels state */
;;;1368     TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_SET_ALL(htim, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
;;;1369     TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET_ALL(htim, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
;;;1370   
;;;1371     /* Initialize the TIM state*/
;;;1372     htim->State = HAL_TIM_STATE_READY;
;;;1373   
;;;1374     return HAL_OK;
;;;1375   }
000010  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L78.18|
000012  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;1340
000014  f884003c          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x3c]         ;1340
000018  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;1354
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_TIM_PWM_MspInit
                  |L78.30|
00001e  2002              MOVS     r0,#2                 ;1359
000020  f884003d          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x3d]         ;1359
000024  1d21              ADDS     r1,r4,#4              ;1362
000026  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1362
000028  f7fffffe          BL       TIM_Base_SetConfig
00002c  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;1365
00002e  f8840048          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x48]         ;1365

;;;1480     TIM_CCxChannelCmd(htim->Instance, Channel, TIM_CCx_ENABLE);
;;;1481

;;;1485       __HAL_TIM_MOE_ENABLE(htim);
;;;1486     }

                          AREA ||i.HAL_TIM_PWM_Start_DMA||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  HAL_TIM_PWM_Start_DMA PROC
;;;1723     */
;;;1724   HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_TIM_PWM_Start_DMA(TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim, uint32_t Channel, const uint32_t *pData,

;;;1726   {

;;;1728     uint32_t tmpsmcr;
;;;1729   
;;;1730     /* Check the parameters */
;;;1731     assert_param(IS_TIM_CCX_INSTANCE(htim->Instance, Channel));
;;;1732   
;;;1733     /* Set the TIM channel state */
;;;1734     if (TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_GET(htim, Channel) == HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_BUSY)

000016  d01a              BEQ      |L84.78|

00001a  d01f              BEQ      |L84.92|
00001c  2d10              CMP      r5,#0x10
00001e  d024              BEQ      |L84.106|
000020  f8940043          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x43]
000024  2802              CMP      r0,#2
000026  d027              BEQ      |L84.120|
;;;1735     {
;;;1736       return HAL_BUSY;
;;;1737     }
;;;1738     else if (TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_GET(htim, Channel) == HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY)
000028  f8940043          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x43]
                  |L84.44|
00002c  2801              CMP      r0,#1
00002e  d026              BEQ      |L84.126|
000030  e07c              B        |L84.300|
                  |L84.50|
000032  f894003e          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x3e]         ;1734

00003a  f894003e          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x3e]
00003e  e7f5              B        |L84.44|
                  |L84.64|

                  |L84.78|
00004e  f8940040          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x40]         ;1734

000056  f8940040          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x40]
00005a  e7e7              B        |L84.44|
                  |L84.92|

000060  2802              CMP      r0,#2                 ;1734

                  |L84.106|

                  |L84.120|

                  |L84.122|
;;;1739     {
;;;1740       if ((pData == NULL) || (Length == 0U))
;;;1741       {
;;;1742         return HAL_ERROR;
;;;1743       }
;;;1744       else
;;;1745       {
;;;1746         TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_SET(htim, Channel, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_BUSY);
;;;1747       }
;;;1748     }
;;;1749     else
;;;1750     {
;;;1751       return HAL_ERROR;
;;;1752     }
;;;1753   
;;;1754     switch (Channel)
;;;1755     {
;;;1756       case TIM_CHANNEL_1:
;;;1757       {
;;;1758         /* Set the DMA compare callbacks */
;;;1759         htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC1]->XferCpltCallback = TIM_DMADelayPulseCplt;
;;;1760         htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC1]->XferHalfCpltCallback = TIM_DMADelayPulseHalfCplt;
;;;1761   
;;;1762         /* Set the DMA error callback */
;;;1763         htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC1]->XferErrorCallback = TIM_DMAError ;
;;;1764   
;;;1765         /* Enable the DMA channel */
;;;1766         if (HAL_DMA_Start_IT(htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC1], (uint32_t)pData, (uint32_t)&htim->Instance->CCR1,
;;;1767                              Length) != HAL_OK)
;;;1768         {
;;;1769           /* Return error status */
;;;1770           return HAL_ERROR;
;;;1771         }
;;;1772   
;;;1773         /* Enable the TIM Capture/Compare 1 DMA request */
;;;1774         __HAL_TIM_ENABLE_DMA(htim, TIM_DMA_CC1);
;;;1775         break;
;;;1776       }
;;;1777   
;;;1778       case TIM_CHANNEL_2:
;;;1779       {
;;;1780         /* Set the DMA compare callbacks */
;;;1781         htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC2]->XferCpltCallback = TIM_DMADelayPulseCplt;
;;;1782         htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC2]->XferHalfCpltCallback = TIM_DMADelayPulseHalfCplt;
;;;1783   
;;;1784         /* Set the DMA error callback */
;;;1785         htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC2]->XferErrorCallback = TIM_DMAError ;
;;;1786   
;;;1787         /* Enable the DMA channel */
;;;1788         if (HAL_DMA_Start_IT(htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC2], (uint32_t)pData, (uint32_t)&htim->Instance->CCR2,
;;;1789                              Length) != HAL_OK)
;;;1790         {
;;;1791           /* Return error status */
;;;1792           return HAL_ERROR;
;;;1793         }
;;;1794         /* Enable the TIM Capture/Compare 2 DMA request */
;;;1795         __HAL_TIM_ENABLE_DMA(htim, TIM_DMA_CC2);
;;;1796         break;
;;;1797       }
;;;1798   
;;;1799       case TIM_CHANNEL_3:
;;;1800       {
;;;1801         /* Set the DMA compare callbacks */
;;;1802         htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC3]->XferCpltCallback = TIM_DMADelayPulseCplt;
;;;1803         htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC3]->XferHalfCpltCallback = TIM_DMADelayPulseHalfCplt;
;;;1804   
;;;1805         /* Set the DMA error callback */
;;;1806         htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC3]->XferErrorCallback = TIM_DMAError ;
;;;1807   
;;;1808         /* Enable the DMA channel */
;;;1809         if (HAL_DMA_Start_IT(htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC3], (uint32_t)pData, (uint32_t)&htim->Instance->CCR3,
;;;1810                              Length) != HAL_OK)
;;;1811         {
;;;1812           /* Return error status */
;;;1813           return HAL_ERROR;
;;;1814         }
;;;1815         /* Enable the TIM Output Capture/Compare 3 request */
;;;1816         __HAL_TIM_ENABLE_DMA(htim, TIM_DMA_CC3);
;;;1817         break;
;;;1818       }
;;;1819   
;;;1820       case TIM_CHANNEL_4:
;;;1821       {
;;;1822         /* Set the DMA compare callbacks */
;;;1823         htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC4]->XferCpltCallback = TIM_DMADelayPulseCplt;
;;;1824         htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC4]->XferHalfCpltCallback = TIM_DMADelayPulseHalfCplt;
;;;1825   
;;;1826         /* Set the DMA error callback */
;;;1827         htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC4]->XferErrorCallback = TIM_DMAError ;
;;;1828   
;;;1829         /* Enable the DMA channel */
;;;1830         if (HAL_DMA_Start_IT(htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC4], (uint32_t)pData, (uint32_t)&htim->Instance->CCR4,
;;;1831                              Length) != HAL_OK)
;;;1832         {
;;;1833           /* Return error status */
;;;1834           return HAL_ERROR;
;;;1835         }
;;;1836         /* Enable the TIM Capture/Compare 4 DMA request */
;;;1837         __HAL_TIM_ENABLE_DMA(htim, TIM_DMA_CC4);
;;;1838         break;
;;;1839       }
;;;1840   
;;;1841       default:
;;;1842         status = HAL_ERROR;
;;;1843         break;
;;;1844     }
;;;1845   
;;;1846     if (status == HAL_OK)
;;;1847     {
;;;1848       /* Enable the Capture compare channel */
;;;1849       TIM_CCxChannelCmd(htim->Instance, Channel, TIM_CCx_ENABLE);
;;;1850   
;;;1851       if (IS_TIM_BREAK_INSTANCE(htim->Instance) != RESET)
;;;1852       {
;;;1853         /* Enable the main output */
;;;1854         __HAL_TIM_MOE_ENABLE(htim);
;;;1855       }
;;;1856   
;;;1857       /* Enable the Peripheral, except in trigger mode where enable is automatically done with trigger */
;;;1858       if (IS_TIM_SLAVE_INSTANCE(htim->Instance))
;;;1859       {
;;;1860         tmpsmcr = htim->Instance->SMCR & TIM_SMCR_SMS;
;;;1861         if (!IS_TIM_SLAVEMODE_TRIGGER_ENABLED(tmpsmcr))
;;;1862         {
;;;1863           __HAL_TIM_ENABLE(htim);
;;;1864         }
;;;1865       }
;;;1866       else
;;;1867       {
;;;1868         __HAL_TIM_ENABLE(htim);
;;;1869       }
;;;1870     }
;;;1871   
;;;1872     /* Return function status */
;;;1873     return status;
;;;1874   }

;;;1566     }

;;;1569     TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_SET(htim, Channel, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_BUSY);

;;;1572     {
;;;1573       case TIM_CHANNEL_1:
;;;1574       {
;;;1575         /* Enable the TIM Capture/Compare 1 interrupt */
;;;1576         __HAL_TIM_ENABLE_IT(htim, TIM_IT_CC1);
;;;1577         break;
;;;1578       }
;;;1579   
;;;1580       case TIM_CHANNEL_2:
;;;1581       {
;;;1582         /* Enable the TIM Capture/Compare 2 interrupt */
;;;1583         __HAL_TIM_ENABLE_IT(htim, TIM_IT_CC2);
;;;1584         break;
;;;1585       }
;;;1586   
;;;1587       case TIM_CHANNEL_3:
;;;1588       {
;;;1589         /* Enable the TIM Capture/Compare 3 interrupt */
;;;1590         __HAL_TIM_ENABLE_IT(htim, TIM_IT_CC3);
;;;1591         break;
;;;1592       }

;;;1595       {
;;;1596         /* Enable the TIM Capture/Compare 4 interrupt */

;;;1598         break;
;;;1599       }

;;;1602         status = HAL_ERROR;
;;;1603         break;

;;;1519   HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_TIM_PWM_Stop(TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim, uint32_t Channel)
000000  b530              PUSH     {r4,r5,lr}
;;;1520   {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000004  460d              MOV      r5,r1
;;;1521     /* Check the parameters */
;;;1522     assert_param(IS_TIM_CCX_INSTANCE(htim->Instance, Channel));
;;;1523   
;;;1524     /* Disable the Capture compare channel */

00000a  2908              CMP      r1,#8
00000c  d00a              BEQ      |L91.36|
00000e  290c              CMP      r1,#0xc
000010  d101              BNE      |L91.22|
;;;5720     {
;;;5721       case TIM_CHANNEL_1:
;;;5722       {
;;;5723         /* Check the parameters */
;;;5724         assert_param(IS_TIM_CC1_INSTANCE(htim->Instance));
;;;5725   
;;;5726         /* Return the capture 1 value */
;;;5727         tmpreg =  htim->Instance->CCR1;
;;;5728   
;;;5729         break;
;;;5730       }
;;;5731       case TIM_CHANNEL_2:
;;;5732       {
;;;5733         /* Check the parameters */
;;;5734         assert_param(IS_TIM_CC2_INSTANCE(htim->Instance));
;;;5735   
;;;5736         /* Return the capture 2 value */
;;;5737         tmpreg =   htim->Instance->CCR2;
;;;5738   
;;;5739         break;
;;;5740       }
;;;5741   
;;;5742       case TIM_CHANNEL_3:
;;;5743       {
;;;5744         /* Check the parameters */
;;;5745         assert_param(IS_TIM_CC3_INSTANCE(htim->Instance));
;;;5746   
;;;5747         /* Return the capture 3 value */
;;;5748         tmpreg =   htim->Instance->CCR3;
;;;5749   
;;;5750         break;
;;;5751       }
;;;5752   
;;;5753       case TIM_CHANNEL_4:
;;;5754       {
;;;5755         /* Check the parameters */
;;;5756         assert_param(IS_TIM_CC4_INSTANCE(htim->Instance));
;;;5757   
;;;5758         /* Return the capture 4 value */
;;;5759         tmpreg =   htim->Instance->CCR4;
000012  6810              LDR      r0,[r2,#0]
000014  6c00              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x40]
                  |L91.22|
;;;5760   
;;;5761         break;
;;;5762       }
;;;5763   
;;;5764       default:
;;;5765         break;
;;;5766     }
;;;5767   
;;;5768     return tmpreg;
;;;5769   }
000016  4770              BX       lr
                  |L91.24|
000018  6810              LDR      r0,[r2,#0]            ;5727
00001a  6b40              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x34]         ;5727
00001c  4770              BX       lr
                  |L91.30|
00001e  6810              LDR      r0,[r2,#0]            ;5737
000020  6b80              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x38]         ;5737
000022  4770              BX       lr
                  |L91.36|
000024  6810              LDR      r0,[r2,#0]            ;5748
000026  6bc0              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x3c]         ;5748
000028  4770              BX       lr
;;;5770   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.HAL_TIM_SlaveConfigSynchro||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HAL_TIM_SlaveConfigSynchro PROC
;;;5631     */
;;;5632   HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_TIM_SlaveConfigSynchro(TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim, const TIM_SlaveConfigTypeDef *sSlaveConfig)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;5633   {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;5634     /* Check the parameters */
;;;5635     assert_param(IS_TIM_SLAVE_INSTANCE(htim->Instance));
;;;5636     assert_param(IS_TIM_SLAVE_MODE(sSlaveConfig->SlaveMode));
;;;5637     assert_param(IS_TIM_TRIGGER_SELECTION(sSlaveConfig->InputTrigger));
;;;5638   
;;;5639     __HAL_LOCK(htim);
000004  f890003c          LDRB     r0,[r0,#0x3c]
000008  2801              CMP      r0,#1
00000a  d012              BEQ      |L92.50|
00000c  2501              MOVS     r5,#1
00000e  f884503c          STRB     r5,[r4,#0x3c]
;;;5640   
;;;5641     htim->State = HAL_TIM_STATE_BUSY;
000012  2002              MOVS     r0,#2
000014  f884003d          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x3d]
;;;5642   
;;;5643     if (TIM_SlaveTimer_SetConfig(htim, sSlaveConfig) != HAL_OK)
000018  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       TIM_SlaveTimer_SetConfig
00001e  0001              MOVS     r1,r0
000020  f04f0000          MOV      r0,#0
000024  d007              BEQ      |L92.54|
;;;5644     {
;;;5645       htim->State = HAL_TIM_STATE_READY;
000026  f884503d          STRB     r5,[r4,#0x3d]
;;;5646       __HAL_UNLOCK(htim);
00002a  f884003c          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x3c]
;;;5647       return HAL_ERROR;
00002e  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;5648     }
;;;5649   
;;;5650     /* Disable Trigger Interrupt */
;;;5651     __HAL_TIM_DISABLE_IT(htim, TIM_IT_TRIGGER);
;;;5652   
;;;5653     /* Disable Trigger DMA request */
;;;5654     __HAL_TIM_DISABLE_DMA(htim, TIM_DMA_TRIGGER);
;;;5655   
;;;5656     htim->State = HAL_TIM_STATE_READY;
;;;5657   
;;;5658     __HAL_UNLOCK(htim);
;;;5659   
;;;5660     return HAL_OK;
;;;5661   }
000030  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L92.50|
000032  2002              MOVS     r0,#2                 ;5639
000034  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L92.54|
000036  6821              LDR      r1,[r4,#0]            ;5651
000038  68ca              LDR      r2,[r1,#0xc]          ;5651
00003a  f0220240          BIC      r2,r2,#0x40           ;5651
00003e  60ca              STR      r2,[r1,#0xc]          ;5651
000040  6821              LDR      r1,[r4,#0]            ;5654
000042  68ca              LDR      r2,[r1,#0xc]          ;5654
000044  f4224280          BIC      r2,r2,#0x4000         ;5654
000048  60ca              STR      r2,[r1,#0xc]          ;5654
00004a  f884503d          STRB     r5,[r4,#0x3d]         ;5656
00004e  f884003c          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x3c]         ;5658
000052  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;5660
000054  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;5662   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.HAL_TIM_SlaveConfigSynchro_IT||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HAL_TIM_SlaveConfigSynchro_IT PROC

;;;5672   HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_TIM_SlaveConfigSynchro_IT(TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim,

;;;5673                                                   const TIM_SlaveConfigTypeDef *sSlaveConfig)
;;;5674   {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;5675     /* Check the parameters */
;;;5676     assert_param(IS_TIM_SLAVE_INSTANCE(htim->Instance));
;;;5677     assert_param(IS_TIM_SLAVE_MODE(sSlaveConfig->SlaveMode));
;;;5678     assert_param(IS_TIM_TRIGGER_SELECTION(sSlaveConfig->InputTrigger));

00000c  2501              MOVS     r5,#1
00000e  f884503c          STRB     r5,[r4,#0x3c]

;;;5687       __HAL_UNLOCK(htim);

;;;5688       return HAL_ERROR;

;;;5689     }
;;;5690

;;;5692     __HAL_TIM_ENABLE_IT(htim, TIM_IT_TRIGGER);

;;;5700   
;;;5701     return HAL_OK;
;;;5702   }

                  |L93.50|

                  |L93.54|

00003e  60ca              STR      r2,[r1,#0xc]          ;5692
000040  6821              LDR      r1,[r4,#0]            ;5695

                          AREA ||i.TIM_Base_SetConfig||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  TIM_Base_SetConfig PROC
;;;6940     */
;;;6941   void TIM_Base_SetConfig(TIM_TypeDef *TIMx, const TIM_Base_InitTypeDef *Structure)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;6942   {
;;;6943     uint32_t tmpcr1;
;;;6944     tmpcr1 = TIMx->CR1;
000002  6802              LDR      r2,[r0,#0]
;;;6945   
;;;6946     /* Set TIM Time Base Unit parameters ---------------------------------------*/
;;;6947     if (IS_TIM_COUNTER_MODE_SELECT_INSTANCE(TIMx))
000004  4b16              LDR      r3,|L96.96|
000006  f04f4680          MOV      r6,#0x40000000
00000a  4298              CMP      r0,r3
00000c  d001              BEQ      |L96.18|
00000e  42b0              CMP      r0,r6
000010  d103              BNE      |L96.26|
                  |L96.18|
;;;6948     {
;;;6949       /* Select the Counter Mode */
;;;6950       tmpcr1 &= ~(TIM_CR1_DIR | TIM_CR1_CMS);
000012  f0220470          BIC      r4,r2,#0x70
;;;6951       tmpcr1 |= Structure->CounterMode;
000016  684a              LDR      r2,[r1,#4]
000018  4322              ORRS     r2,r2,r4
                  |L96.26|
;;;6952     }
;;;6953   
;;;6954     if (IS_TIM_CLOCK_DIVISION_INSTANCE(TIMx))
00001a  4c12              LDR      r4,|L96.100|
00001c  4d12              LDR      r5,|L96.104|
00001e  4298              CMP      r0,r3
000020  d005              BEQ      |L96.46|
000022  42b0              CMP      r0,r6
000024  d003              BEQ      |L96.46|
000026  42a0              CMP      r0,r4
000028  d001              BEQ      |L96.46|
00002a  42a8              CMP      r0,r5
00002c  d103              BNE      |L96.54|
                  |L96.46|
;;;6955     {
;;;6956       /* Set the clock division */
;;;6957       tmpcr1 &= ~TIM_CR1_CKD;
00002e  f4227640          BIC      r6,r2,#0x300
;;;6958       tmpcr1 |= (uint32_t)Structure->ClockDivision;
000032  68ca              LDR      r2,[r1,#0xc]
000034  4332              ORRS     r2,r2,r6
                  |L96.54|
;;;6959     }
;;;6960   
;;;6961     /* Set the auto-reload preload */
;;;6962     MODIFY_REG(tmpcr1, TIM_CR1_ARPE, Structure->AutoReloadPreload);
000036  694e              LDR      r6,[r1,#0x14]
000038  f0220280          BIC      r2,r2,#0x80
00003c  4332              ORRS     r2,r2,r6
;;;6963   
;;;6964     TIMx->CR1 = tmpcr1;
00003e  6002              STR      r2,[r0,#0]
;;;6965   
;;;6966     /* Set the Autoreload value */
;;;6967     TIMx->ARR = (uint32_t)Structure->Period ;
000040  688a              LDR      r2,[r1,#8]
000042  62c2              STR      r2,[r0,#0x2c]
;;;6968   
;;;6969     /* Set the Prescaler value */
;;;6970     TIMx->PSC = Structure->Prescaler;
000044  680a              LDR      r2,[r1,#0]
000046  6282              STR      r2,[r0,#0x28]
;;;6971   
;;;6972     if (IS_TIM_REPETITION_COUNTER_INSTANCE(TIMx))
000048  4298              CMP      r0,r3
00004a  d003              BEQ      |L96.84|
00004c  42a0              CMP      r0,r4
00004e  d001              BEQ      |L96.84|
000050  42a8              CMP      r0,r5
000052  d101              BNE      |L96.88|
                  |L96.84|
;;;6973     {
;;;6974       /* Set the Repetition Counter value */
;;;6975       TIMx->RCR = Structure->RepetitionCounter;
000054  6909              LDR      r1,[r1,#0x10]
000056  6301              STR      r1,[r0,#0x30]
                  |L96.88|
;;;6976     }
;;;6977   
;;;6978     /* Generate an update event to reload the Prescaler
;;;6979        and the repetition counter (only for advanced timer) value immediately */
;;;6980     TIMx->EGR = TIM_EGR_UG;
000058  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
00005a  6141              STR      r1,[r0,#0x14]
;;;6981   }
00005c  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;6982   
                          ENDP

00005e  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L96.96|
                          DCD      0x40012c00
                  |L96.100|
                          DCD      0x40014000
                  |L96.104|
                          DCD      0x40014400

                          AREA ||i.TIM_CCxChannelCmd||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  TIM_CCxChannelCmd PROC
;;;7840     */
;;;7841   void TIM_CCxChannelCmd(TIM_TypeDef *TIMx, uint32_t Channel, uint32_t ChannelState)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;7842   {
;;;7843     uint32_t tmp;
;;;7844   
;;;7845     /* Check the parameters */
;;;7846     assert_param(IS_TIM_CC1_INSTANCE(TIMx));
;;;7847     assert_param(IS_TIM_CHANNELS(Channel));
;;;7848   
;;;7849     tmp = TIM_CCER_CC1E << (Channel & 0x1FU); /* 0x1FU = 31 bits max shift */
000002  f001031f          AND      r3,r1,#0x1f
000006  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
;;;7850   
;;;7851     /* Reset the CCxE Bit */
;;;7852     TIMx->CCER &= ~tmp;
000008  6a04              LDR      r4,[r0,#0x20]
00000a  4099              LSLS     r1,r1,r3              ;7849
00000c  438c              BICS     r4,r4,r1
00000e  6204              STR      r4,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7853   
;;;7854     /* Set or reset the CCxE Bit */
;;;7855     TIMx->CCER |= (uint32_t)(ChannelState << (Channel & 0x1FU)); /* 0x1FU = 31 bits max shift */
000010  6a01              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x20]
000012  409a              LSLS     r2,r2,r3
000014  4311              ORRS     r1,r1,r2
000016  6201              STR      r1,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7856   }
000018  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;7857   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.TIM_DMACaptureCplt||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  TIM_DMACaptureCplt PROC
;;;6763     */
;;;6764   void TIM_DMACaptureCplt(DMA_HandleTypeDef *hdma)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;6765   {
;;;6766     TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim = (TIM_HandleTypeDef *)((DMA_HandleTypeDef *)hdma)->Parent;
;;;6767   
;;;6768     if (hdma == htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC1])
000002  6a84              LDR      r4,[r0,#0x28]
;;;6769     {
;;;6770       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_1;
000004  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
000006  6a62              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x24]         ;6768
000008  4282              CMP      r2,r0                 ;6768
00000a  d107              BNE      |L98.28|
00000c  7721              STRB     r1,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;6771   
;;;6772       if (hdma->Init.Mode == DMA_NORMAL)
00000e  69c0              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x1c]
000010  bb38              CBNZ     r0,|L98.98|
;;;6773       {
;;;6774         TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_1, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
000012  f884103e          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x3e]
;;;6775         TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_1, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
000016  f8841044          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x44]
00001a  e022              B        |L98.98|
                  |L98.28|
;;;6776       }
;;;6777     }
;;;6778     else if (hdma == htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC2])
00001c  6aa2              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x28]
00001e  4282              CMP      r2,r0
000020  d108              BNE      |L98.52|
;;;6779     {
;;;6780       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_2;
000022  2202              MOVS     r2,#2
000024  7722              STRB     r2,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;6781   
;;;6782       if (hdma->Init.Mode == DMA_NORMAL)
000026  69c0              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x1c]
000028  b9d8              CBNZ     r0,|L98.98|
;;;6783       {
;;;6784         TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_2, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
00002a  f884103f          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x3f]
;;;6785         TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_2, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
00002e  f8841045          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x45]
000032  e016              B        |L98.98|
                  |L98.52|
;;;6786       }
;;;6787     }
;;;6788     else if (hdma == htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC3])
000034  6ae2              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x2c]
000036  4282              CMP      r2,r0
000038  d108              BNE      |L98.76|
;;;6789     {
;;;6790       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_3;
00003a  2204              MOVS     r2,#4
00003c  7722              STRB     r2,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;6791   
;;;6792       if (hdma->Init.Mode == DMA_NORMAL)
00003e  69c0              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x1c]
000040  b978              CBNZ     r0,|L98.98|
;;;6793       {
;;;6794         TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_3, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
000042  f8841040          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x40]
;;;6795         TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_3, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
000046  f8841046          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x46]
00004a  e00a              B        |L98.98|
                  |L98.76|
;;;6796       }
;;;6797     }
;;;6798     else if (hdma == htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC4])
00004c  6b22              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x30]
00004e  4282              CMP      r2,r0
000050  d107              BNE      |L98.98|
;;;6799     {
;;;6800       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_4;
000052  2208              MOVS     r2,#8
000054  7722              STRB     r2,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;6801   
;;;6802       if (hdma->Init.Mode == DMA_NORMAL)
000056  69c0              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x1c]
000058  b918              CBNZ     r0,|L98.98|
;;;6803       {
;;;6804         TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_4, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
00005a  f8841041          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x41]
;;;6805         TIM_CHANNEL_N_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_4, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
00005e  f8841047          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x47]
                  |L98.98|
;;;6806       }
;;;6807     }
;;;6808     else
;;;6809     {
;;;6810       /* nothing to do */
;;;6811     }
;;;6812   
;;;6813   #if (USE_HAL_TIM_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
;;;6814     htim->IC_CaptureCallback(htim);
;;;6815   #else
;;;6816     HAL_TIM_IC_CaptureCallback(htim);
000062  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000064  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_TIM_IC_CaptureCallback
;;;6817   #endif /* USE_HAL_TIM_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
;;;6818   
;;;6819     htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_CLEARED;
000068  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00006a  7720              STRB     r0,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;6820   }
00006c  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;6821   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.TIM_DMACaptureHalfCplt||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  TIM_DMACaptureHalfCplt PROC
;;;6826     */
;;;6827   void TIM_DMACaptureHalfCplt(DMA_HandleTypeDef *hdma)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;6828   {
;;;6829     TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim = (TIM_HandleTypeDef *)((DMA_HandleTypeDef *)hdma)->Parent;
;;;6830   
;;;6831     if (hdma == htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC1])
000002  6a84              LDR      r4,[r0,#0x28]
000004  6a61              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x24]
000006  4281              CMP      r1,r0
000008  d101              BNE      |L99.14|
;;;6832     {
;;;6833       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_1;
00000a  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
00000c  e00d              B        |L99.42|
                  |L99.14|
;;;6834     }
;;;6835     else if (hdma == htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC2])
00000e  6aa1              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x28]
000010  4281              CMP      r1,r0
000012  d101              BNE      |L99.24|
;;;6836     {
;;;6837       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_2;
000014  2002              MOVS     r0,#2
000016  e008              B        |L99.42|
                  |L99.24|
;;;6838     }
;;;6839     else if (hdma == htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC3])
000018  6ae1              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x2c]
00001a  4281              CMP      r1,r0
00001c  d101              BNE      |L99.34|
;;;6840     {
;;;6841       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_3;
00001e  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
000020  e003              B        |L99.42|
                  |L99.34|
;;;6842     }
;;;6843     else if (hdma == htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC4])
000022  6b21              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x30]
000024  4281              CMP      r1,r0
000026  d101              BNE      |L99.44|
;;;6844     {
;;;6845       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_4;
000028  2008              MOVS     r0,#8
                  |L99.42|
00002a  7720              STRB     r0,[r4,#0x1c]
                  |L99.44|
;;;6846     }
;;;6847     else
;;;6848     {
;;;6849       /* nothing to do */
;;;6850     }
;;;6851   
;;;6852   #if (USE_HAL_TIM_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
;;;6853     htim->IC_CaptureHalfCpltCallback(htim);
;;;6854   #else
;;;6855     HAL_TIM_IC_CaptureHalfCpltCallback(htim);
00002c  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00002e  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_TIM_IC_CaptureHalfCpltCallback
;;;6856   #endif /* USE_HAL_TIM_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
;;;6857   
;;;6858     htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_CLEARED;
000032  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000034  7720              STRB     r0,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;6859   }
000036  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;6860   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.TIM_DMADelayPulseCplt||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  TIM_DMADelayPulseCplt PROC
;;;6665     */
;;;6666   static void TIM_DMADelayPulseCplt(DMA_HandleTypeDef *hdma)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;6667   {
;;;6668     TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim = (TIM_HandleTypeDef *)((DMA_HandleTypeDef *)hdma)->Parent;
;;;6669   
;;;6670     if (hdma == htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC1])
000002  6a84              LDR      r4,[r0,#0x28]
;;;6671     {
;;;6672       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_1;
000004  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
000006  6a62              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x24]         ;6670
000008  4282              CMP      r2,r0                 ;6670
00000a  d105              BNE      |L100.24|
00000c  7721              STRB     r1,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;6673   
;;;6674       if (hdma->Init.Mode == DMA_NORMAL)
00000e  69c0              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x1c]
000010  b9f8              CBNZ     r0,|L100.82|
;;;6675       {
;;;6676         TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_1, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
000012  f884103e          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x3e]
000016  e01c              B        |L100.82|
                  |L100.24|
;;;6677       }
;;;6678     }
;;;6679     else if (hdma == htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC2])
000018  6aa2              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x28]
00001a  4282              CMP      r2,r0
00001c  d106              BNE      |L100.44|
;;;6680     {
;;;6681       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_2;
00001e  2202              MOVS     r2,#2
000020  7722              STRB     r2,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;6682   
;;;6683       if (hdma->Init.Mode == DMA_NORMAL)
000022  69c0              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x1c]
000024  b9a8              CBNZ     r0,|L100.82|
;;;6684       {
;;;6685         TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_2, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
000026  f884103f          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x3f]
00002a  e012              B        |L100.82|
                  |L100.44|
;;;6686       }
;;;6687     }
;;;6688     else if (hdma == htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC3])
00002c  6ae2              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x2c]
00002e  4282              CMP      r2,r0
000030  d106              BNE      |L100.64|
;;;6689     {
;;;6690       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_3;
000032  2204              MOVS     r2,#4
000034  7722              STRB     r2,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;6691   
;;;6692       if (hdma->Init.Mode == DMA_NORMAL)
000036  69c0              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x1c]
000038  b958              CBNZ     r0,|L100.82|
;;;6693       {
;;;6694         TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_3, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
00003a  f8841040          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x40]
00003e  e008              B        |L100.82|
                  |L100.64|
;;;6695       }
;;;6696     }
;;;6697     else if (hdma == htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC4])
000040  6b22              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x30]
000042  4282              CMP      r2,r0
000044  d105              BNE      |L100.82|
;;;6698     {
;;;6699       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_4;
000046  2208              MOVS     r2,#8
000048  7722              STRB     r2,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;6700   
;;;6701       if (hdma->Init.Mode == DMA_NORMAL)
00004a  69c0              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x1c]
00004c  b908              CBNZ     r0,|L100.82|
;;;6702       {
;;;6703         TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_4, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
00004e  f8841041          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x41]
                  |L100.82|
;;;6704       }
;;;6705     }
;;;6706     else
;;;6707     {
;;;6708       /* nothing to do */
;;;6709     }
;;;6710   
;;;6711   #if (USE_HAL_TIM_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
;;;6712     htim->PWM_PulseFinishedCallback(htim);
;;;6713   #else
;;;6714     HAL_TIM_PWM_PulseFinishedCallback(htim);
000052  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000054  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_TIM_PWM_PulseFinishedCallback
;;;6715   #endif /* USE_HAL_TIM_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
;;;6716   
;;;6717     htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_CLEARED;
000058  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00005a  7720              STRB     r0,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;6718   }
00005c  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;6719   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.TIM_DMADelayPulseHalfCplt||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  TIM_DMADelayPulseHalfCplt PROC
;;;6724     */
;;;6725   void TIM_DMADelayPulseHalfCplt(DMA_HandleTypeDef *hdma)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;6726   {
;;;6727     TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim = (TIM_HandleTypeDef *)((DMA_HandleTypeDef *)hdma)->Parent;

;;;6730     {
;;;6731       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_1;
00000a  2001              MOVS     r0,#1

                  |L101.14|
;;;6732     }

;;;6734     {
;;;6735       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_2;

                  |L101.24|
;;;6736     }

00001a  4281              CMP      r1,r0
00001c  d101              BNE      |L101.34|
;;;6738     {
;;;6739       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_3;
00001e  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
000020  e003              B        |L101.42|
                  |L101.34|
;;;6740     }
;;;6741     else if (hdma == htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC4])

000024  4281              CMP      r1,r0

;;;6743       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_4;

                  |L101.42|

                  |L101.44|
;;;6744     }
;;;6745     else
;;;6746     {
;;;6747       /* nothing to do */
;;;6748     }
;;;6749   
;;;6750   #if (USE_HAL_TIM_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
;;;6751     htim->PWM_PulseFinishedHalfCpltCallback(htim);
;;;6752   #else

00002e  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_TIM_PWM_PulseFinishedHalfCpltCallback
;;;6754   #endif /* USE_HAL_TIM_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */

000032  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000034  7720              STRB     r0,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;6757   }
000036  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;6758   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.TIM_DMAError||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  TIM_DMAError PROC
;;;6622     */
;;;6623   void TIM_DMAError(DMA_HandleTypeDef *hdma)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;6624   {
;;;6625     TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim = (TIM_HandleTypeDef *)((DMA_HandleTypeDef *)hdma)->Parent;
;;;6626   
;;;6627     if (hdma == htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC1])
000002  6a84              LDR      r4,[r0,#0x28]
;;;6628     {
;;;6629       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_1;
000004  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
000006  6a62              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x24]         ;6627
000008  4282              CMP      r2,r0                 ;6627
00000a  d103              BNE      |L102.20|
00000c  7721              STRB     r1,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;6630       TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_1, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
00000e  f884103e          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x3e]
000012  e019              B        |L102.72|
                  |L102.20|
;;;6631     }
;;;6632     else if (hdma == htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC2])
000014  6aa2              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x28]
000016  4282              CMP      r2,r0
000018  d104              BNE      |L102.36|
;;;6633     {
;;;6634       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_2;
00001a  2002              MOVS     r0,#2
00001c  7720              STRB     r0,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;6635       TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_2, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
00001e  f884103f          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x3f]
000022  e011              B        |L102.72|
                  |L102.36|
;;;6636     }
;;;6637     else if (hdma == htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC3])
000024  6ae2              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x2c]
000026  4282              CMP      r2,r0
000028  d104              BNE      |L102.52|
;;;6638     {
;;;6639       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_3;
00002a  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
00002c  7720              STRB     r0,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;6640       TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_3, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
00002e  f8841040          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x40]
000032  e009              B        |L102.72|
                  |L102.52|
;;;6641     }
;;;6642     else if (hdma == htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_CC4])
000034  6b22              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x30]
000036  4282              CMP      r2,r0
000038  d104              BNE      |L102.68|
;;;6643     {
;;;6644       htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_4;
00003a  2008              MOVS     r0,#8
00003c  7720              STRB     r0,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;6645       TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_SET(htim, TIM_CHANNEL_4, HAL_TIM_CHANNEL_STATE_READY);
00003e  f8841041          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x41]
000042  e001              B        |L102.72|
                  |L102.68|
;;;6646     }
;;;6647     else
;;;6648     {
;;;6649       htim->State = HAL_TIM_STATE_READY;
000044  f884103d          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x3d]
                  |L102.72|
;;;6650     }
;;;6651   
;;;6652   #if (USE_HAL_TIM_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
;;;6653     htim->ErrorCallback(htim);
;;;6654   #else
;;;6655     HAL_TIM_ErrorCallback(htim);
000048  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00004a  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_TIM_ErrorCallback
;;;6656   #endif /* USE_HAL_TIM_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
;;;6657   
;;;6658     htim->Channel = HAL_TIM_ACTIVE_CHANNEL_CLEARED;
00004e  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000050  7720              STRB     r0,[r4,#0x1c]
;;;6659   }
000052  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;6660   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.TIM_DMAPeriodElapsedCplt||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  TIM_DMAPeriodElapsedCplt PROC
;;;6865     */
;;;6866   static void TIM_DMAPeriodElapsedCplt(DMA_HandleTypeDef *hdma)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;6867   {
;;;6868     TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim = (TIM_HandleTypeDef *)((DMA_HandleTypeDef *)hdma)->Parent;
000002  6a80              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x28]
;;;6869   
;;;6870     if (htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_UPDATE]->Init.Mode == DMA_NORMAL)
000004  6a01              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x20]
000006  69c9              LDR      r1,[r1,#0x1c]
000008  b911              CBNZ     r1,|L103.16|
;;;6871     {
;;;6872       htim->State = HAL_TIM_STATE_READY;
00000a  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
00000c  f880103d          STRB     r1,[r0,#0x3d]
                  |L103.16|
;;;6873     }
;;;6874   
;;;6875   #if (USE_HAL_TIM_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
;;;6876     htim->PeriodElapsedCallback(htim);
;;;6877   #else
;;;6878     HAL_TIM_PeriodElapsedCallback(htim);
000010  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_TIM_PeriodElapsedCallback
;;;6879   #endif /* USE_HAL_TIM_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
;;;6880   }
000014  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;6881   
                          ENDP

                          AREA ||i.TIM_DMATriggerCplt||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  TIM_DMATriggerCplt PROC
;;;6902     */
;;;6903   static void TIM_DMATriggerCplt(DMA_HandleTypeDef *hdma)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;6904   {
;;;6905     TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim = (TIM_HandleTypeDef *)((DMA_HandleTypeDef *)hdma)->Parent;
000002  6a80              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x28]
;;;6906   
;;;6907     if (htim->hdma[TIM_DMA_ID_TRIGGER]->Init.Mode == DMA_NORMAL)
000004  6b81              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x38]

000008  b911              CBNZ     r1,|L105.16|
;;;6908     {
;;;6909       htim->State = HAL_TIM_STATE_READY;
00000a  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
00000c  f880103d          STRB     r1,[r0,#0x3d]
                  |L105.16|
;;;6910     }
;;;6911

;;;6913     htim->TriggerCallback(htim);

;;;6916   #endif /* USE_HAL_TIM_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */

;;;6918
