                          AREA ||i.TIM_ETR_SetConfig||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  TIM_ETR_SetConfig PROC
;;;7808     */
;;;7809   void TIM_ETR_SetConfig(TIM_TypeDef *TIMx, uint32_t TIM_ExtTRGPrescaler,
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;7810                          uint32_t TIM_ExtTRGPolarity, uint32_t ExtTRGFilter)
;;;7811   {
;;;7812     uint32_t tmpsmcr;
;;;7813   
;;;7814     tmpsmcr = TIMx->SMCR;
000002  6884              LDR      r4,[r0,#8]
;;;7815   
;;;7816     /* Reset the ETR Bits */
;;;7817     tmpsmcr &= ~(TIM_SMCR_ETF | TIM_SMCR_ETPS | TIM_SMCR_ECE | TIM_SMCR_ETP);
;;;7818   
;;;7819     /* Set the Prescaler, the Filter value and the Polarity */
;;;7820     tmpsmcr |= (uint32_t)(TIM_ExtTRGPrescaler | (TIM_ExtTRGPolarity | (ExtTRGFilter << 8U)));
000004  ea422203          ORR      r2,r2,r3,LSL #8
000008  f424447f          BIC      r4,r4,#0xff00         ;7817
00000c  430a              ORRS     r2,r2,r1
00000e  4322              ORRS     r2,r2,r4
;;;7821   
;;;7822     /* Write to TIMx SMCR */
;;;7823     TIMx->SMCR = tmpsmcr;
000010  6082              STR      r2,[r0,#8]
;;;7824   }
000012  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;7825   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.TIM_ITRx_SetConfig||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  TIM_ITRx_SetConfig PROC
;;;7778     */
;;;7779   static void TIM_ITRx_SetConfig(TIM_TypeDef *TIMx, uint32_t InputTriggerSource)
000000  6882              LDR      r2,[r0,#8]
;;;7780   {
;;;7781     uint32_t tmpsmcr;
;;;7782   
;;;7783     /* Get the TIMx SMCR register value */
;;;7784     tmpsmcr = TIMx->SMCR;
;;;7785     /* Reset the TS Bits */
;;;7786     tmpsmcr &= ~TIM_SMCR_TS;
000002  f0220270          BIC      r2,r2,#0x70
;;;7787     /* Set the Input Trigger source and the slave mode*/
;;;7788     tmpsmcr |= (InputTriggerSource | TIM_SLAVEMODE_EXTERNAL1);
000006  430a              ORRS     r2,r2,r1
000008  f0420107          ORR      r1,r2,#7
;;;7789     /* Write to TIMx SMCR */
;;;7790     TIMx->SMCR = tmpsmcr;
00000c  6081              STR      r1,[r0,#8]
;;;7791   }
00000e  4770              BX       lr
;;;7792   /**
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.TIM_OC1_SetConfig||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  TIM_OC1_SetConfig PROC
;;;6988     */
;;;6989   static void TIM_OC1_SetConfig(TIM_TypeDef *TIMx, const TIM_OC_InitTypeDef *OC_Config)
000000  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;6990   {
;;;6991     uint32_t tmpccmrx;
;;;6992     uint32_t tmpccer;
;;;6993     uint32_t tmpcr2;
;;;6994   
;;;6995     /* Disable the Channel 1: Reset the CC1E Bit */
;;;6996     TIMx->CCER &= ~TIM_CCER_CC1E;
000002  6a02              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x20]
000004  f0220201          BIC      r2,r2,#1
000008  6202              STR      r2,[r0,#0x20]
;;;6997   
;;;6998     /* Get the TIMx CCER register value */
;;;6999     tmpccer = TIMx->CCER;
00000a  6a05              LDR      r5,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7000     /* Get the TIMx CR2 register value */
;;;7001     tmpcr2 =  TIMx->CR2;
00000c  6843              LDR      r3,[r0,#4]
;;;7002   
;;;7003     /* Get the TIMx CCMR1 register value */
;;;7004     tmpccmrx = TIMx->CCMR1;
00000e  6982              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x18]
;;;7005   
;;;7006     /* Reset the Output Compare Mode Bits */
;;;7007     tmpccmrx &= ~TIM_CCMR1_OC1M;
000010  4c15              LDR      r4,|L109.104|
;;;7008     tmpccmrx &= ~TIM_CCMR1_CC1S;
;;;7009     /* Select the Output Compare Mode */
;;;7010     tmpccmrx |= OC_Config->OCMode;
;;;7011   
;;;7012     /* Reset the Output Polarity level */
;;;7013     tmpccer &= ~TIM_CCER_CC1P;
000012  f0250502          BIC      r5,r5,#2
000016  4022              ANDS     r2,r2,r4              ;7007
000018  680c              LDR      r4,[r1,#0]            ;7010
00001a  f0220203          BIC      r2,r2,#3              ;7008
00001e  4314              ORRS     r4,r4,r2              ;7010
;;;7014     /* Set the Output Compare Polarity */
;;;7015     tmpccer |= OC_Config->OCPolarity;
000020  688a              LDR      r2,[r1,#8]
;;;7016   
;;;7017     if (IS_TIM_CCXN_INSTANCE(TIMx, TIM_CHANNEL_1))
000022  4e13              LDR      r6,|L109.112|
000024  432a              ORRS     r2,r2,r5              ;7015
000026  4d11              LDR      r5,|L109.108|
000028  4f12              LDR      r7,|L109.116|
00002a  42a8              CMP      r0,r5
00002c  d003              BEQ      |L109.54|
00002e  42b0              CMP      r0,r6
000030  d001              BEQ      |L109.54|
000032  42b8              CMP      r0,r7
000034  d106              BNE      |L109.68|
                  |L109.54|
;;;7018     {
;;;7019       /* Check parameters */
;;;7020       assert_param(IS_TIM_OCN_POLARITY(OC_Config->OCNPolarity));
;;;7021   
;;;7022       /* Reset the Output N Polarity level */
;;;7023       tmpccer &= ~TIM_CCER_CC1NP;
000036  f0220c08          BIC      r12,r2,#8
;;;7024       /* Set the Output N Polarity */
;;;7025       tmpccer |= OC_Config->OCNPolarity;
00003a  68ca              LDR      r2,[r1,#0xc]
00003c  ea42020c          ORR      r2,r2,r12
;;;7026       /* Reset the Output N State */
;;;7027       tmpccer &= ~TIM_CCER_CC1NE;
000040  f0220204          BIC      r2,r2,#4
                  |L109.68|
;;;7028     }
;;;7029   
;;;7030     if (IS_TIM_BREAK_INSTANCE(TIMx))
000044  42a8              CMP      r0,r5
000046  d003              BEQ      |L109.80|
000048  42b0              CMP      r0,r6
00004a  d001              BEQ      |L109.80|
00004c  42b8              CMP      r0,r7
00004e  d105              BNE      |L109.92|
                  |L109.80|
;;;7031     {
;;;7032       /* Check parameters */
;;;7033       assert_param(IS_TIM_OCNIDLE_STATE(OC_Config->OCNIdleState));
;;;7034       assert_param(IS_TIM_OCIDLE_STATE(OC_Config->OCIdleState));
;;;7035   
;;;7036       /* Reset the Output Compare and Output Compare N IDLE State */
;;;7037       tmpcr2 &= ~TIM_CR2_OIS1;
;;;7038       tmpcr2 &= ~TIM_CR2_OIS1N;
;;;7039       /* Set the Output Idle state */
;;;7040       tmpcr2 |= OC_Config->OCIdleState;
000050  694d              LDR      r5,[r1,#0x14]
000052  f4237340          BIC      r3,r3,#0x300          ;7038
000056  431d              ORRS     r5,r5,r3
;;;7041       /* Set the Output N Idle state */
;;;7042       tmpcr2 |= OC_Config->OCNIdleState;
000058  698b              LDR      r3,[r1,#0x18]
00005a  432b              ORRS     r3,r3,r5
                  |L109.92|
;;;7043     }
;;;7044   
;;;7045     /* Write to TIMx CR2 */
;;;7046     TIMx->CR2 = tmpcr2;
00005c  6043              STR      r3,[r0,#4]
;;;7047   
;;;7048     /* Write to TIMx CCMR1 */
;;;7049     TIMx->CCMR1 = tmpccmrx;
00005e  6184              STR      r4,[r0,#0x18]
;;;7050   
;;;7051     /* Set the Capture Compare Register value */
;;;7052     TIMx->CCR1 = OC_Config->Pulse;
000060  6849              LDR      r1,[r1,#4]
000062  6341              STR      r1,[r0,#0x34]
;;;7053   
;;;7054     /* Write to TIMx CCER */
;;;7055     TIMx->CCER = tmpccer;
000064  6202              STR      r2,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7056   }
000066  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
;;;7057   
                          ENDP

                  |L109.104|
                          DCD      0xfffeff8f
                  |L109.108|
                          DCD      0x40012c00
                  |L109.112|
                          DCD      0x40014000
                  |L109.116|
                          DCD      0x40014400

                          AREA ||i.TIM_OC2_SetConfig||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  TIM_OC2_SetConfig PROC
;;;7063     */
;;;7064   void TIM_OC2_SetConfig(TIM_TypeDef *TIMx, const TIM_OC_InitTypeDef *OC_Config)
000000  b530              PUSH     {r4,r5,lr}
;;;7065   {
;;;7066     uint32_t tmpccmrx;
;;;7067     uint32_t tmpccer;
;;;7068     uint32_t tmpcr2;
;;;7069   
;;;7070     /* Disable the Channel 2: Reset the CC2E Bit */
;;;7071     TIMx->CCER &= ~TIM_CCER_CC2E;
000002  6a02              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x20]
000004  f0220210          BIC      r2,r2,#0x10
000008  6202              STR      r2,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7072   
;;;7073     /* Get the TIMx CCER register value */
;;;7074     tmpccer = TIMx->CCER;
00000a  6a04              LDR      r4,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7075     /* Get the TIMx CR2 register value */
;;;7076     tmpcr2 =  TIMx->CR2;
00000c  6842              LDR      r2,[r0,#4]
;;;7077   
;;;7078     /* Get the TIMx CCMR1 register value */
;;;7079     tmpccmrx = TIMx->CCMR1;
00000e  6983              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x18]
;;;7080   
;;;7081     /* Reset the Output Compare mode and Capture/Compare selection Bits */
;;;7082     tmpccmrx &= ~TIM_CCMR1_OC2M;
000010  4d15              LDR      r5,|L110.104|
000012  402b              ANDS     r3,r3,r5
;;;7083     tmpccmrx &= ~TIM_CCMR1_CC2S;
;;;7084   
;;;7085     /* Select the Output Compare Mode */
;;;7086     tmpccmrx |= (OC_Config->OCMode << 8U);
000014  680d              LDR      r5,[r1,#0]
000016  f4237340          BIC      r3,r3,#0x300          ;7083
00001a  ea432505          ORR      r5,r3,r5,LSL #8
;;;7087   
;;;7088     /* Reset the Output Polarity level */
;;;7089     tmpccer &= ~TIM_CCER_CC2P;
00001e  f0240320          BIC      r3,r4,#0x20
;;;7090     /* Set the Output Compare Polarity */
;;;7091     tmpccer |= (OC_Config->OCPolarity << 4U);
000022  688c              LDR      r4,[r1,#8]
000024  ea431304          ORR      r3,r3,r4,LSL #4
;;;7092   
;;;7093     if (IS_TIM_CCXN_INSTANCE(TIMx, TIM_CHANNEL_2))
000028  4c10              LDR      r4,|L110.108|
00002a  42a0              CMP      r0,r4
00002c  d107              BNE      |L110.62|
;;;7094     {
;;;7095       assert_param(IS_TIM_OCN_POLARITY(OC_Config->OCNPolarity));
;;;7096   
;;;7097       /* Reset the Output N Polarity level */
;;;7098       tmpccer &= ~TIM_CCER_CC2NP;
;;;7099       /* Set the Output N Polarity */
;;;7100       tmpccer |= (OC_Config->OCNPolarity << 4U);
00002e  68cc              LDR      r4,[r1,#0xc]
000030  f0230380          BIC      r3,r3,#0x80           ;7098
000034  ea431304          ORR      r3,r3,r4,LSL #4
;;;7101       /* Reset the Output N State */
;;;7102       tmpccer &= ~TIM_CCER_CC2NE;
000038  f0230340          BIC      r3,r3,#0x40
00003c  e005              B        |L110.74|
                  |L110.62|
;;;7103   
;;;7104     }
;;;7105   
;;;7106     if (IS_TIM_BREAK_INSTANCE(TIMx))
00003e  4c0c              LDR      r4,|L110.112|
000040  42a0              CMP      r0,r4
000042  d002              BEQ      |L110.74|
000044  4c0b              LDR      r4,|L110.116|
000046  42a0              CMP      r0,r4
000048  d107              BNE      |L110.90|
                  |L110.74|
;;;7107     {
;;;7108       /* Check parameters */
;;;7109       assert_param(IS_TIM_OCNIDLE_STATE(OC_Config->OCNIdleState));
;;;7110       assert_param(IS_TIM_OCIDLE_STATE(OC_Config->OCIdleState));
;;;7111   
;;;7112       /* Reset the Output Compare and Output Compare N IDLE State */
;;;7113       tmpcr2 &= ~TIM_CR2_OIS2;
;;;7114       tmpcr2 &= ~TIM_CR2_OIS2N;
;;;7115       /* Set the Output Idle state */
;;;7116       tmpcr2 |= (OC_Config->OCIdleState << 2U);
00004a  694c              LDR      r4,[r1,#0x14]
00004c  f4226240          BIC      r2,r2,#0xc00          ;7114
000050  ea420284          ORR      r2,r2,r4,LSL #2
;;;7117       /* Set the Output N Idle state */
;;;7118       tmpcr2 |= (OC_Config->OCNIdleState << 2U);
000054  698c              LDR      r4,[r1,#0x18]
000056  ea420284          ORR      r2,r2,r4,LSL #2
                  |L110.90|
;;;7119     }
;;;7120   
;;;7121     /* Write to TIMx CR2 */
;;;7122     TIMx->CR2 = tmpcr2;
00005a  6042              STR      r2,[r0,#4]
;;;7123   
;;;7124     /* Write to TIMx CCMR1 */
;;;7125     TIMx->CCMR1 = tmpccmrx;
00005c  6185              STR      r5,[r0,#0x18]
;;;7126   
;;;7127     /* Set the Capture Compare Register value */
;;;7128     TIMx->CCR2 = OC_Config->Pulse;
00005e  6849              LDR      r1,[r1,#4]
000060  6381              STR      r1,[r0,#0x38]
;;;7129   
;;;7130     /* Write to TIMx CCER */
;;;7131     TIMx->CCER = tmpccer;
000062  6203              STR      r3,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7132   }
000064  bd30              POP      {r4,r5,pc}
;;;7133   
                          ENDP

000066  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L110.104|
                          DCD      0xfeff8fff
                  |L110.108|
                          DCD      0x40012c00
                  |L110.112|
                          DCD      0x40014000
                  |L110.116|
                          DCD      0x40014400

                          AREA ||i.TIM_OC3_SetConfig||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  TIM_OC3_SetConfig PROC
;;;7139     */
;;;7140   static void TIM_OC3_SetConfig(TIM_TypeDef *TIMx, const TIM_OC_InitTypeDef *OC_Config)
000000  b530              PUSH     {r4,r5,lr}
;;;7141   {
;;;7142     uint32_t tmpccmrx;
;;;7143     uint32_t tmpccer;
;;;7144     uint32_t tmpcr2;
;;;7145   
;;;7146     /* Disable the Channel 3: Reset the CC2E Bit */
;;;7147     TIMx->CCER &= ~TIM_CCER_CC3E;
000002  6a02              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x20]
000004  f4227280          BIC      r2,r2,#0x100
000008  6202              STR      r2,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7148   
;;;7149     /* Get the TIMx CCER register value */
;;;7150     tmpccer = TIMx->CCER;
00000a  6a04              LDR      r4,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7151     /* Get the TIMx CR2 register value */
;;;7152     tmpcr2 =  TIMx->CR2;
00000c  6842              LDR      r2,[r0,#4]
;;;7153   
;;;7154     /* Get the TIMx CCMR2 register value */
;;;7155     tmpccmrx = TIMx->CCMR2;
00000e  69c3              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x1c]
;;;7156   
;;;7157     /* Reset the Output Compare mode and Capture/Compare selection Bits */
;;;7158     tmpccmrx &= ~TIM_CCMR2_OC3M;
000010  4d14              LDR      r5,|L111.100|
000012  402b              ANDS     r3,r3,r5
;;;7159     tmpccmrx &= ~TIM_CCMR2_CC3S;
;;;7160     /* Select the Output Compare Mode */
;;;7161     tmpccmrx |= OC_Config->OCMode;
000014  680d              LDR      r5,[r1,#0]
000016  f0230303          BIC      r3,r3,#3              ;7159
00001a  431d              ORRS     r5,r5,r3
;;;7162   
;;;7163     /* Reset the Output Polarity level */
;;;7164     tmpccer &= ~TIM_CCER_CC3P;
00001c  f4247300          BIC      r3,r4,#0x200
;;;7165     /* Set the Output Compare Polarity */
;;;7166     tmpccer |= (OC_Config->OCPolarity << 8U);
000020  688c              LDR      r4,[r1,#8]
000022  ea432304          ORR      r3,r3,r4,LSL #8
;;;7167   
;;;7168     if (IS_TIM_CCXN_INSTANCE(TIMx, TIM_CHANNEL_3))
000026  4c10              LDR      r4,|L111.104|
000028  42a0              CMP      r0,r4
00002a  d107              BNE      |L111.60|
;;;7169     {
;;;7170       assert_param(IS_TIM_OCN_POLARITY(OC_Config->OCNPolarity));
;;;7171   
;;;7172       /* Reset the Output N Polarity level */
;;;7173       tmpccer &= ~TIM_CCER_CC3NP;
;;;7174       /* Set the Output N Polarity */
;;;7175       tmpccer |= (OC_Config->OCNPolarity << 8U);
00002c  68cc              LDR      r4,[r1,#0xc]
00002e  f4236300          BIC      r3,r3,#0x800          ;7173
000032  ea432304          ORR      r3,r3,r4,LSL #8
;;;7176       /* Reset the Output N State */
;;;7177       tmpccer &= ~TIM_CCER_CC3NE;
000036  f4236380          BIC      r3,r3,#0x400
00003a  e005              B        |L111.72|
                  |L111.60|
;;;7178     }
;;;7179   
;;;7180     if (IS_TIM_BREAK_INSTANCE(TIMx))
00003c  4c0b              LDR      r4,|L111.108|
00003e  42a0              CMP      r0,r4
000040  d002              BEQ      |L111.72|
000042  4c0b              LDR      r4,|L111.112|
000044  42a0              CMP      r0,r4
000046  d107              BNE      |L111.88|
                  |L111.72|
;;;7181     {
;;;7182       /* Check parameters */
;;;7183       assert_param(IS_TIM_OCNIDLE_STATE(OC_Config->OCNIdleState));
;;;7184       assert_param(IS_TIM_OCIDLE_STATE(OC_Config->OCIdleState));
;;;7185   
;;;7186       /* Reset the Output Compare and Output Compare N IDLE State */
;;;7187       tmpcr2 &= ~TIM_CR2_OIS3;
;;;7188       tmpcr2 &= ~TIM_CR2_OIS3N;
;;;7189       /* Set the Output Idle state */
;;;7190       tmpcr2 |= (OC_Config->OCIdleState << 4U);
000048  694c              LDR      r4,[r1,#0x14]
00004a  f4225240          BIC      r2,r2,#0x3000         ;7188
00004e  ea421204          ORR      r2,r2,r4,LSL #4
;;;7191       /* Set the Output N Idle state */
;;;7192       tmpcr2 |= (OC_Config->OCNIdleState << 4U);
000052  698c              LDR      r4,[r1,#0x18]
000054  ea421204          ORR      r2,r2,r4,LSL #4
                  |L111.88|
;;;7193     }
;;;7194   
;;;7195     /* Write to TIMx CR2 */
;;;7196     TIMx->CR2 = tmpcr2;
000058  6042              STR      r2,[r0,#4]
;;;7197   
;;;7198     /* Write to TIMx CCMR2 */
;;;7199     TIMx->CCMR2 = tmpccmrx;
00005a  61c5              STR      r5,[r0,#0x1c]
;;;7200   
;;;7201     /* Set the Capture Compare Register value */
;;;7202     TIMx->CCR3 = OC_Config->Pulse;
00005c  6849              LDR      r1,[r1,#4]
00005e  63c1              STR      r1,[r0,#0x3c]
;;;7203   
;;;7204     /* Write to TIMx CCER */
;;;7205     TIMx->CCER = tmpccer;
000060  6203              STR      r3,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7206   }
000062  bd30              POP      {r4,r5,pc}
;;;7207   
                          ENDP

                  |L111.100|
                          DCD      0xfffeff8f
                  |L111.104|
                          DCD      0x40012c00
                  |L111.108|
                          DCD      0x40014000
                  |L111.112|
                          DCD      0x40014400

                          AREA ||i.TIM_OC4_SetConfig||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  TIM_OC4_SetConfig PROC
;;;7213     */
;;;7214   static void TIM_OC4_SetConfig(TIM_TypeDef *TIMx, const TIM_OC_InitTypeDef *OC_Config)
000000  b530              PUSH     {r4,r5,lr}
;;;7215   {
;;;7216     uint32_t tmpccmrx;
;;;7217     uint32_t tmpccer;
;;;7218     uint32_t tmpcr2;
;;;7219   
;;;7220     /* Disable the Channel 4: Reset the CC4E Bit */
;;;7221     TIMx->CCER &= ~TIM_CCER_CC4E;
000002  6a02              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x20]
000004  f4225280          BIC      r2,r2,#0x1000
000008  6202              STR      r2,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7222   
;;;7223     /* Get the TIMx CCER register value */
;;;7224     tmpccer = TIMx->CCER;
00000a  6a04              LDR      r4,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7225     /* Get the TIMx CR2 register value */
;;;7226     tmpcr2 =  TIMx->CR2;
00000c  6842              LDR      r2,[r0,#4]
;;;7227   
;;;7228     /* Get the TIMx CCMR2 register value */
;;;7229     tmpccmrx = TIMx->CCMR2;
00000e  69c3              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x1c]
;;;7230   
;;;7231     /* Reset the Output Compare mode and Capture/Compare selection Bits */
;;;7232     tmpccmrx &= ~TIM_CCMR2_OC4M;
000010  4d0f              LDR      r5,|L112.80|
;;;7233     tmpccmrx &= ~TIM_CCMR2_CC4S;
;;;7234   
;;;7235     /* Select the Output Compare Mode */
;;;7236     tmpccmrx |= (OC_Config->OCMode << 8U);
;;;7237   
;;;7238     /* Reset the Output Polarity level */
;;;7239     tmpccer &= ~TIM_CCER_CC4P;
000012  f4245400          BIC      r4,r4,#0x2000
000016  402b              ANDS     r3,r3,r5              ;7232
000018  680d              LDR      r5,[r1,#0]            ;7236
00001a  f4237340          BIC      r3,r3,#0x300          ;7233
00001e  ea432305          ORR      r3,r3,r5,LSL #8       ;7236
;;;7240     /* Set the Output Compare Polarity */
;;;7241     tmpccer |= (OC_Config->OCPolarity << 12U);
000022  688d              LDR      r5,[r1,#8]
000024  ea443405          ORR      r4,r4,r5,LSL #12
;;;7242   
;;;7243     if (IS_TIM_BREAK_INSTANCE(TIMx))
000028  4d0a              LDR      r5,|L112.84|
00002a  42a8              CMP      r0,r5
00002c  d005              BEQ      |L112.58|
00002e  4d0a              LDR      r5,|L112.88|
000030  42a8              CMP      r0,r5
000032  d002              BEQ      |L112.58|
000034  4d09              LDR      r5,|L112.92|
000036  42a8              CMP      r0,r5
000038  d104              BNE      |L112.68|
                  |L112.58|
;;;7244     {
;;;7245       /* Check parameters */
;;;7246       assert_param(IS_TIM_OCIDLE_STATE(OC_Config->OCIdleState));
;;;7247   
;;;7248       /* Reset the Output Compare IDLE State */
;;;7249       tmpcr2 &= ~TIM_CR2_OIS4;
;;;7250   
;;;7251       /* Set the Output Idle state */
;;;7252       tmpcr2 |= (OC_Config->OCIdleState << 6U);
00003a  694d              LDR      r5,[r1,#0x14]
00003c  f4224280          BIC      r2,r2,#0x4000         ;7249
000040  ea421285          ORR      r2,r2,r5,LSL #6
                  |L112.68|
;;;7253     }
;;;7254   
;;;7255     /* Write to TIMx CR2 */
;;;7256     TIMx->CR2 = tmpcr2;
000044  6042              STR      r2,[r0,#4]
;;;7257   
;;;7258     /* Write to TIMx CCMR2 */
;;;7259     TIMx->CCMR2 = tmpccmrx;
000046  61c3              STR      r3,[r0,#0x1c]
;;;7260   
;;;7261     /* Set the Capture Compare Register value */
;;;7262     TIMx->CCR4 = OC_Config->Pulse;
000048  6849              LDR      r1,[r1,#4]
00004a  6401              STR      r1,[r0,#0x40]
;;;7263   
;;;7264     /* Write to TIMx CCER */
;;;7265     TIMx->CCER = tmpccer;
00004c  6204              STR      r4,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7266   }
00004e  bd30              POP      {r4,r5,pc}
;;;7267   
                          ENDP

                  |L112.80|
                          DCD      0xfeff8fff
                  |L112.84|
                          DCD      0x40012c00
                  |L112.88|
                          DCD      0x40014000
                  |L112.92|
                          DCD      0x40014400

                          AREA ||i.TIM_OC5_SetConfig||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  TIM_OC5_SetConfig PROC
;;;7273     */
;;;7274   static void TIM_OC5_SetConfig(TIM_TypeDef *TIMx,
000000  b530              PUSH     {r4,r5,lr}
;;;7275                                 const TIM_OC_InitTypeDef *OC_Config)
;;;7276   {
;;;7277     uint32_t tmpccmrx;
;;;7278     uint32_t tmpccer;
;;;7279     uint32_t tmpcr2;
;;;7280   
;;;7281     /* Disable the output: Reset the CCxE Bit */
;;;7282     TIMx->CCER &= ~TIM_CCER_CC5E;
000002  6a02              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x20]
000004  f4223280          BIC      r2,r2,#0x10000
000008  6202              STR      r2,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7283   
;;;7284     /* Get the TIMx CCER register value */
;;;7285     tmpccer = TIMx->CCER;
00000a  6a04              LDR      r4,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7286     /* Get the TIMx CR2 register value */
;;;7287     tmpcr2 =  TIMx->CR2;
00000c  6842              LDR      r2,[r0,#4]
;;;7288     /* Get the TIMx CCMR1 register value */
;;;7289     tmpccmrx = TIMx->CCMR3;
00000e  6d43              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x54]
;;;7290   
;;;7291     /* Reset the Output Compare Mode Bits */
;;;7292     tmpccmrx &= ~(TIM_CCMR3_OC5M);
000010  4d0e              LDR      r5,|L113.76|
000012  402b              ANDS     r3,r3,r5
;;;7293     /* Select the Output Compare Mode */
;;;7294     tmpccmrx |= OC_Config->OCMode;
000014  680d              LDR      r5,[r1,#0]
000016  431d              ORRS     r5,r5,r3
;;;7295   
;;;7296     /* Reset the Output Polarity level */
;;;7297     tmpccer &= ~TIM_CCER_CC5P;
000018  f4243300          BIC      r3,r4,#0x20000
;;;7298     /* Set the Output Compare Polarity */
;;;7299     tmpccer |= (OC_Config->OCPolarity << 16U);
00001c  890c              LDRH     r4,[r1,#8]
00001e  ea434304          ORR      r3,r3,r4,LSL #16
;;;7300   
;;;7301     if (IS_TIM_BREAK_INSTANCE(TIMx))
000022  4c0b              LDR      r4,|L113.80|
000024  42a0              CMP      r0,r4
000026  d005              BEQ      |L113.52|
000028  4c0a              LDR      r4,|L113.84|
00002a  42a0              CMP      r0,r4
00002c  d002              BEQ      |L113.52|
00002e  4c0a              LDR      r4,|L113.88|
000030  42a0              CMP      r0,r4
000032  d104              BNE      |L113.62|
                  |L113.52|
;;;7302     {
;;;7303       /* Reset the Output Compare IDLE State */
;;;7304       tmpcr2 &= ~TIM_CR2_OIS5;
;;;7305       /* Set the Output Idle state */
;;;7306       tmpcr2 |= (OC_Config->OCIdleState << 8U);
000034  694c              LDR      r4,[r1,#0x14]
000036  f4223280          BIC      r2,r2,#0x10000        ;7304
00003a  ea422204          ORR      r2,r2,r4,LSL #8
                  |L113.62|
;;;7307     }
;;;7308     /* Write to TIMx CR2 */
;;;7309     TIMx->CR2 = tmpcr2;
00003e  6042              STR      r2,[r0,#4]
;;;7310   
;;;7311     /* Write to TIMx CCMR3 */
;;;7312     TIMx->CCMR3 = tmpccmrx;
000040  6545              STR      r5,[r0,#0x54]
;;;7313   
;;;7314     /* Set the Capture Compare Register value */
;;;7315     TIMx->CCR5 = OC_Config->Pulse;
000042  6849              LDR      r1,[r1,#4]
000044  6581              STR      r1,[r0,#0x58]
;;;7316   
;;;7317     /* Write to TIMx CCER */
;;;7318     TIMx->CCER = tmpccer;
000046  6203              STR      r3,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7319   }
000048  bd30              POP      {r4,r5,pc}
;;;7320   
                          ENDP

00004a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L113.76|
                          DCD      0xfffeff8f
                  |L113.80|
                          DCD      0x40012c00
                  |L113.84|
                          DCD      0x40014000
                  |L113.88|
                          DCD      0x40014400

                          AREA ||i.TIM_OC6_SetConfig||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  TIM_OC6_SetConfig PROC
;;;7326     */
;;;7327   static void TIM_OC6_SetConfig(TIM_TypeDef *TIMx,
000000  b530              PUSH     {r4,r5,lr}
;;;7328                                 const TIM_OC_InitTypeDef *OC_Config)
;;;7329   {
;;;7330     uint32_t tmpccmrx;
;;;7331     uint32_t tmpccer;
;;;7332     uint32_t tmpcr2;
;;;7333   
;;;7334     /* Disable the output: Reset the CCxE Bit */
;;;7335     TIMx->CCER &= ~TIM_CCER_CC6E;
000002  6a02              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x20]
000004  f4221280          BIC      r2,r2,#0x100000
000008  6202              STR      r2,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7336   
;;;7337     /* Get the TIMx CCER register value */
;;;7338     tmpccer = TIMx->CCER;
00000a  6a04              LDR      r4,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7339     /* Get the TIMx CR2 register value */
;;;7340     tmpcr2 =  TIMx->CR2;
00000c  6842              LDR      r2,[r0,#4]
;;;7341     /* Get the TIMx CCMR1 register value */
;;;7342     tmpccmrx = TIMx->CCMR3;
00000e  6d43              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x54]
;;;7343   
;;;7344     /* Reset the Output Compare Mode Bits */
;;;7345     tmpccmrx &= ~(TIM_CCMR3_OC6M);
000010  4d0e              LDR      r5,|L114.76|
;;;7346     /* Select the Output Compare Mode */
;;;7347     tmpccmrx |= (OC_Config->OCMode << 8U);
;;;7348   
;;;7349     /* Reset the Output Polarity level */
;;;7350     tmpccer &= (uint32_t)~TIM_CCER_CC6P;
000012  f4241400          BIC      r4,r4,#0x200000
000016  402b              ANDS     r3,r3,r5              ;7345
000018  680d              LDR      r5,[r1,#0]            ;7347
00001a  ea432305          ORR      r3,r3,r5,LSL #8       ;7347
;;;7351     /* Set the Output Compare Polarity */
;;;7352     tmpccer |= (OC_Config->OCPolarity << 20U);
00001e  890d              LDRH     r5,[r1,#8]
000020  ea445405          ORR      r4,r4,r5,LSL #20
;;;7353   
;;;7354     if (IS_TIM_BREAK_INSTANCE(TIMx))
000024  4d0a              LDR      r5,|L114.80|
000026  42a8              CMP      r0,r5
000028  d005              BEQ      |L114.54|
00002a  4d0a              LDR      r5,|L114.84|
00002c  42a8              CMP      r0,r5
00002e  d002              BEQ      |L114.54|
000030  4d09              LDR      r5,|L114.88|
000032  42a8              CMP      r0,r5
000034  d104              BNE      |L114.64|
                  |L114.54|
;;;7355     {
;;;7356       /* Reset the Output Compare IDLE State */
;;;7357       tmpcr2 &= ~TIM_CR2_OIS6;
;;;7358       /* Set the Output Idle state */
;;;7359       tmpcr2 |= (OC_Config->OCIdleState << 10U);
000036  694d              LDR      r5,[r1,#0x14]
000038  f4222280          BIC      r2,r2,#0x40000        ;7357
00003c  ea422285          ORR      r2,r2,r5,LSL #10
                  |L114.64|
;;;7360     }
;;;7361   
;;;7362     /* Write to TIMx CR2 */
;;;7363     TIMx->CR2 = tmpcr2;
000040  6042              STR      r2,[r0,#4]
;;;7364   
;;;7365     /* Write to TIMx CCMR3 */
;;;7366     TIMx->CCMR3 = tmpccmrx;
000042  6543              STR      r3,[r0,#0x54]
;;;7367   
;;;7368     /* Set the Capture Compare Register value */
;;;7369     TIMx->CCR6 = OC_Config->Pulse;
000044  6849              LDR      r1,[r1,#4]
000046  65c1              STR      r1,[r0,#0x5c]
;;;7370   
;;;7371     /* Write to TIMx CCER */
;;;7372     TIMx->CCER = tmpccer;
000048  6204              STR      r4,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7373   }
00004a  bd30              POP      {r4,r5,pc}
;;;7374   
                          ENDP

                  |L114.76|
                          DCD      0xfeff8fff
                  |L114.80|
                          DCD      0x40012c00
                  |L114.84|
                          DCD      0x40014000
                  |L114.88|
                          DCD      0x40014400

                          AREA ||i.TIM_SlaveTimer_SetConfig||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  TIM_SlaveTimer_SetConfig PROC
;;;7380     */
;;;7381   static HAL_StatusTypeDef TIM_SlaveTimer_SetConfig(TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim,
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;7382                                                     const TIM_SlaveConfigTypeDef *sSlaveConfig)
;;;7383   {
;;;7384     HAL_StatusTypeDef status = HAL_OK;
;;;7385     uint32_t tmpsmcr;
;;;7386     uint32_t tmpccmr1;
;;;7387     uint32_t tmpccer;
;;;7388   
;;;7389     /* Get the TIMx SMCR register value */
;;;7390     tmpsmcr = htim->Instance->SMCR;
000002  6805              LDR      r5,[r0,#0]
000004  2400              MOVS     r4,#0                 ;7384
000006  68aa              LDR      r2,[r5,#8]
;;;7391   
;;;7392     /* Reset the Trigger Selection Bits */
;;;7393     tmpsmcr &= ~TIM_SMCR_TS;
000008  f0220370          BIC      r3,r2,#0x70
;;;7394     /* Set the Input Trigger source */
;;;7395     tmpsmcr |= sSlaveConfig->InputTrigger;
00000c  684a              LDR      r2,[r1,#4]
00000e  431a              ORRS     r2,r2,r3
;;;7396   
;;;7397     /* Reset the slave mode Bits */
;;;7398     tmpsmcr &= ~TIM_SMCR_SMS;
000010  4b1e              LDR      r3,|L115.140|
000012  401a              ANDS     r2,r2,r3
;;;7399     /* Set the slave mode */
;;;7400     tmpsmcr |= sSlaveConfig->SlaveMode;
000014  680b              LDR      r3,[r1,#0]
000016  4313              ORRS     r3,r3,r2
;;;7401   
;;;7402     /* Write to TIMx SMCR */
;;;7403     htim->Instance->SMCR = tmpsmcr;
000018  60ab              STR      r3,[r5,#8]
;;;7404   
;;;7405     /* Configure the trigger prescaler, filter, and polarity */
;;;7406     switch (sSlaveConfig->InputTrigger)
00001a  684a              LDR      r2,[r1,#4]
00001c  f0120f0f          TST      r2,#0xf
000020  d131              BNE      |L115.134|
000022  1112              ASRS     r2,r2,#4
000024  2a08              CMP      r2,#8
000026  d22e              BCS      |L115.134|
000028  e8dff002          TBB      [pc,r2]
00002c  2e2e2e2e          DCB      0x2e,0x2e,0x2e,0x2e
000030  0b212704          DCB      0x0b,0x21,0x27,0x04
;;;7407     {
;;;7408       case TIM_TS_ETRF:
;;;7409       {
;;;7410         /* Check the parameters */
;;;7411         assert_param(IS_TIM_CLOCKSOURCE_ETRMODE1_INSTANCE(htim->Instance));
;;;7412         assert_param(IS_TIM_TRIGGERPRESCALER(sSlaveConfig->TriggerPrescaler));
;;;7413         assert_param(IS_TIM_TRIGGERPOLARITY(sSlaveConfig->TriggerPolarity));
;;;7414         assert_param(IS_TIM_TRIGGERFILTER(sSlaveConfig->TriggerFilter));
;;;7415         /* Configure the ETR Trigger source */
;;;7416         TIM_ETR_SetConfig(htim->Instance,
000034  690b              LDR      r3,[r1,#0x10]
000036  e9d12102          LDRD     r2,r1,[r1,#8]
00003a  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]
00003c  f7fffffe          BL       TIM_ETR_SetConfig
;;;7417                           sSlaveConfig->TriggerPrescaler,
;;;7418                           sSlaveConfig->TriggerPolarity,
;;;7419                           sSlaveConfig->TriggerFilter);
;;;7420         break;
000040  e022              B        |L115.136|
;;;7421       }
;;;7422   
;;;7423       case TIM_TS_TI1F_ED:
;;;7424       {
;;;7425         /* Check the parameters */
;;;7426         assert_param(IS_TIM_CC1_INSTANCE(htim->Instance));
;;;7427         assert_param(IS_TIM_TRIGGERFILTER(sSlaveConfig->TriggerFilter));
;;;7428   
;;;7429         if (sSlaveConfig->SlaveMode == TIM_SLAVEMODE_GATED)
000042  680a              LDR      r2,[r1,#0]
000044  2a05              CMP      r2,#5
000046  d010              BEQ      |L115.106|
;;;7430         {
;;;7431           return HAL_ERROR;
;;;7432         }
;;;7433   
;;;7434         /* Disable the Channel 1: Reset the CC1E Bit */
;;;7435         tmpccer = htim->Instance->CCER;
000048  6802              LDR      r2,[r0,#0]
00004a  6a13              LDR      r3,[r2,#0x20]
;;;7436         htim->Instance->CCER &= ~TIM_CCER_CC1E;
00004c  6a15              LDR      r5,[r2,#0x20]
00004e  f0250501          BIC      r5,r5,#1
000052  6215              STR      r5,[r2,#0x20]
;;;7437         tmpccmr1 = htim->Instance->CCMR1;
000054  6802              LDR      r2,[r0,#0]
000056  6995              LDR      r5,[r2,#0x18]
;;;7438   
;;;7439         /* Set the filter */
;;;7440         tmpccmr1 &= ~TIM_CCMR1_IC1F;
;;;7441         tmpccmr1 |= ((sSlaveConfig->TriggerFilter) << 4U);
000058  6909              LDR      r1,[r1,#0x10]
00005a  f02505f0          BIC      r5,r5,#0xf0           ;7440
00005e  ea451101          ORR      r1,r5,r1,LSL #4
;;;7442   
;;;7443         /* Write to TIMx CCMR1 and CCER registers */
;;;7444         htim->Instance->CCMR1 = tmpccmr1;
000062  6191              STR      r1,[r2,#0x18]
;;;7445         htim->Instance->CCER = tmpccer;
000064  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]
000066  6203              STR      r3,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7446         break;
000068  e00e              B        |L115.136|
                  |L115.106|
00006a  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;7431
;;;7447       }
;;;7448   
;;;7449       case TIM_TS_TI1FP1:
;;;7450       {
;;;7451         /* Check the parameters */
;;;7452         assert_param(IS_TIM_CC1_INSTANCE(htim->Instance));
;;;7453         assert_param(IS_TIM_TRIGGERPOLARITY(sSlaveConfig->TriggerPolarity));
;;;7454         assert_param(IS_TIM_TRIGGERFILTER(sSlaveConfig->TriggerFilter));
;;;7455   
;;;7456         /* Configure TI1 Filter and Polarity */
;;;7457         TIM_TI1_ConfigInputStage(htim->Instance,
;;;7458                                  sSlaveConfig->TriggerPolarity,
;;;7459                                  sSlaveConfig->TriggerFilter);
;;;7460         break;
;;;7461       }
;;;7462   
;;;7463       case TIM_TS_TI2FP2:
;;;7464       {
;;;7465         /* Check the parameters */
;;;7466         assert_param(IS_TIM_CC2_INSTANCE(htim->Instance));
;;;7467         assert_param(IS_TIM_TRIGGERPOLARITY(sSlaveConfig->TriggerPolarity));
;;;7468         assert_param(IS_TIM_TRIGGERFILTER(sSlaveConfig->TriggerFilter));
;;;7469   
;;;7470         /* Configure TI2 Filter and Polarity */
;;;7471         TIM_TI2_ConfigInputStage(htim->Instance,
;;;7472                                  sSlaveConfig->TriggerPolarity,
;;;7473                                  sSlaveConfig->TriggerFilter);
;;;7474         break;
;;;7475       }
;;;7476   
;;;7477       case TIM_TS_ITR0:
;;;7478       case TIM_TS_ITR1:
;;;7479       case TIM_TS_ITR2:
;;;7480       case TIM_TS_ITR3:
;;;7481       {
;;;7482         /* Check the parameter */
;;;7483         assert_param(IS_TIM_CC2_INSTANCE(htim->Instance));
;;;7484         break;
;;;7485       }
;;;7486   
;;;7487       default:
;;;7488         status = HAL_ERROR;
;;;7489         break;
;;;7490     }
;;;7491   
;;;7492     return status;
;;;7493   }
00006c  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
00006e  690a              LDR      r2,[r1,#0x10]         ;7457
000070  6889              LDR      r1,[r1,#8]            ;7457
000072  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]            ;7457
000074  f7fffffe          BL       TIM_TI1_ConfigInputStage
000078  e006              B        |L115.136|
00007a  690a              LDR      r2,[r1,#0x10]         ;7471
00007c  6889              LDR      r1,[r1,#8]            ;7471
00007e  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]            ;7471
000080  f7fffffe          BL       TIM_TI2_ConfigInputStage
000084  e000              B        |L115.136|
                  |L115.134|
000086  2401              MOVS     r4,#1                 ;7488
                  |L115.136|
000088  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;7492
00008a  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;7494   
                          ENDP

                  |L115.140|
                          DCD      0xfffefff8

                          AREA ||i.TIM_TI1_ConfigInputStage||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  TIM_TI1_ConfigInputStage PROC
;;;7561     */
;;;7562   static void TIM_TI1_ConfigInputStage(TIM_TypeDef *TIMx, uint32_t TIM_ICPolarity, uint32_t TIM_ICFilter)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;7563   {
;;;7564     uint32_t tmpccmr1;
;;;7565     uint32_t tmpccer;
;;;7566   
;;;7567     /* Disable the Channel 1: Reset the CC1E Bit */
;;;7568     tmpccer = TIMx->CCER;
000002  6a03              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7569     TIMx->CCER &= ~TIM_CCER_CC1E;
000004  6a04              LDR      r4,[r0,#0x20]
000006  f0240401          BIC      r4,r4,#1
00000a  6204              STR      r4,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7570     tmpccmr1 = TIMx->CCMR1;
00000c  6984              LDR      r4,[r0,#0x18]
;;;7571   
;;;7572     /* Set the filter */
;;;7573     tmpccmr1 &= ~TIM_CCMR1_IC1F;
00000e  f02404f0          BIC      r4,r4,#0xf0
;;;7574     tmpccmr1 |= (TIM_ICFilter << 4U);
000012  ea441402          ORR      r4,r4,r2,LSL #4
;;;7575   
;;;7576     /* Select the Polarity and set the CC1E Bit */
;;;7577     tmpccer &= ~(TIM_CCER_CC1P | TIM_CCER_CC1NP);
000016  f023020a          BIC      r2,r3,#0xa
;;;7578     tmpccer |= TIM_ICPolarity;
00001a  430a              ORRS     r2,r2,r1
;;;7579   
;;;7580     /* Write to TIMx CCMR1 and CCER registers */
;;;7581     TIMx->CCMR1 = tmpccmr1;
00001c  6184              STR      r4,[r0,#0x18]
;;;7582     TIMx->CCER = tmpccer;
00001e  6202              STR      r2,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7583   }
000020  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;7584   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.TIM_TI1_SetConfig||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  TIM_TI1_SetConfig PROC
;;;7514     */
;;;7515   void TIM_TI1_SetConfig(TIM_TypeDef *TIMx, uint32_t TIM_ICPolarity, uint32_t TIM_ICSelection,
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;7516                          uint32_t TIM_ICFilter)
;;;7517   {
;;;7518     uint32_t tmpccmr1;
;;;7519     uint32_t tmpccer;
;;;7520   
;;;7521     /* Disable the Channel 1: Reset the CC1E Bit */
;;;7522     TIMx->CCER &= ~TIM_CCER_CC1E;
000002  6a04              LDR      r4,[r0,#0x20]
000004  f0240401          BIC      r4,r4,#1
000008  6204              STR      r4,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7523     tmpccmr1 = TIMx->CCMR1;
00000a  6984              LDR      r4,[r0,#0x18]
;;;7524     tmpccer = TIMx->CCER;
00000c  6a05              LDR      r5,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7525   
;;;7526     /* Select the Input */
;;;7527     if (IS_TIM_CC2_INSTANCE(TIMx) != RESET)
00000e  4e0e              LDR      r6,|L117.72|
000010  42b0              CMP      r0,r6
000012  d005              BEQ      |L117.32|
000014  f1b04f80          CMP      r0,#0x40000000
000018  d002              BEQ      |L117.32|
00001a  4e0c              LDR      r6,|L117.76|
00001c  42b0              CMP      r0,r6
00001e  d103              BNE      |L117.40|
                  |L117.32|
;;;7528     {
;;;7529       tmpccmr1 &= ~TIM_CCMR1_CC1S;
000020  f0240403          BIC      r4,r4,#3
;;;7530       tmpccmr1 |= TIM_ICSelection;
000024  4314              ORRS     r4,r4,r2
000026  e001              B        |L117.44|
                  |L117.40|
;;;7531     }
;;;7532     else
;;;7533     {
;;;7534       tmpccmr1 |= TIM_CCMR1_CC1S_0;
000028  f0440401          ORR      r4,r4,#1
                  |L117.44|
;;;7535     }
;;;7536   
;;;7537     /* Set the filter */
;;;7538     tmpccmr1 &= ~TIM_CCMR1_IC1F;
00002c  071a              LSLS     r2,r3,#28
00002e  f02404f0          BIC      r4,r4,#0xf0
;;;7539     tmpccmr1 |= ((TIM_ICFilter << 4U) & TIM_CCMR1_IC1F);
000032  ea446212          ORR      r2,r4,r2,LSR #24
;;;7540   
;;;7541     /* Select the Polarity and set the CC1E Bit */
;;;7542     tmpccer &= ~(TIM_CCER_CC1P | TIM_CCER_CC1NP);
000036  f025030a          BIC      r3,r5,#0xa
;;;7543     tmpccer |= (TIM_ICPolarity & (TIM_CCER_CC1P | TIM_CCER_CC1NP));
00003a  f001010a          AND      r1,r1,#0xa
00003e  4319              ORRS     r1,r1,r3
;;;7544   
;;;7545     /* Write to TIMx CCMR1 and CCER registers */
;;;7546     TIMx->CCMR1 = tmpccmr1;
000040  6182              STR      r2,[r0,#0x18]
;;;7547     TIMx->CCER = tmpccer;
000042  6201              STR      r1,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7548   }
000044  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;7549   
                          ENDP

000046  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L117.72|
                          DCD      0x40012c00
                  |L117.76|
                          DCD      0x40014000

                          AREA ||i.TIM_TI2_ConfigInputStage||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  TIM_TI2_ConfigInputStage PROC
;;;7644     */
;;;7645   static void TIM_TI2_ConfigInputStage(TIM_TypeDef *TIMx, uint32_t TIM_ICPolarity, uint32_t TIM_ICFilter)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;7646   {
;;;7647     uint32_t tmpccmr1;
;;;7648     uint32_t tmpccer;
;;;7649   
;;;7650     /* Disable the Channel 2: Reset the CC2E Bit */
;;;7651     TIMx->CCER &= ~TIM_CCER_CC2E;
000002  6a03              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x20]
000004  f0230310          BIC      r3,r3,#0x10
000008  6203              STR      r3,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7652     tmpccmr1 = TIMx->CCMR1;
00000a  6983              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x18]
;;;7653     tmpccer = TIMx->CCER;
00000c  6a04              LDR      r4,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7654   
;;;7655     /* Set the filter */
;;;7656     tmpccmr1 &= ~TIM_CCMR1_IC2F;
00000e  f4234370          BIC      r3,r3,#0xf000
;;;7657     tmpccmr1 |= (TIM_ICFilter << 12U);
000012  ea433202          ORR      r2,r3,r2,LSL #12
;;;7658   
;;;7659     /* Select the Polarity and set the CC2E Bit */
;;;7660     tmpccer &= ~(TIM_CCER_CC2P | TIM_CCER_CC2NP);
000016  f02403a0          BIC      r3,r4,#0xa0
;;;7661     tmpccer |= (TIM_ICPolarity << 4U);
00001a  ea431101          ORR      r1,r3,r1,LSL #4
;;;7662   
;;;7663     /* Write to TIMx CCMR1 and CCER registers */
;;;7664     TIMx->CCMR1 = tmpccmr1 ;
00001e  6182              STR      r2,[r0,#0x18]
;;;7665     TIMx->CCER = tmpccer;
000020  6201              STR      r1,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7666   }
000022  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;7667   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.TIM_TI2_SetConfig||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  TIM_TI2_SetConfig PROC
;;;7604     */
;;;7605   static void TIM_TI2_SetConfig(TIM_TypeDef *TIMx, uint32_t TIM_ICPolarity, uint32_t TIM_ICSelection,
000000  b530              PUSH     {r4,r5,lr}
;;;7606                                 uint32_t TIM_ICFilter)
;;;7607   {
;;;7608     uint32_t tmpccmr1;
;;;7609     uint32_t tmpccer;
;;;7610   
;;;7611     /* Disable the Channel 2: Reset the CC2E Bit */
;;;7612     TIMx->CCER &= ~TIM_CCER_CC2E;
000002  6a04              LDR      r4,[r0,#0x20]
000004  f0240410          BIC      r4,r4,#0x10
000008  6204              STR      r4,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7613     tmpccmr1 = TIMx->CCMR1;
00000a  6984              LDR      r4,[r0,#0x18]
;;;7614     tmpccer = TIMx->CCER;
00000c  6a05              LDR      r5,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7615   
;;;7616     /* Select the Input */
;;;7617     tmpccmr1 &= ~TIM_CCMR1_CC2S;
00000e  f4247440          BIC      r4,r4,#0x300
;;;7618     tmpccmr1 |= (TIM_ICSelection << 8U);
000012  ea442202          ORR      r2,r4,r2,LSL #8
;;;7619   
;;;7620     /* Set the filter */
;;;7621     tmpccmr1 &= ~TIM_CCMR1_IC2F;
000016  f4224470          BIC      r4,r2,#0xf000
;;;7622     tmpccmr1 |= ((TIM_ICFilter << 12U) & TIM_CCMR1_IC2F);
00001a  f64f72ff          MOV      r2,#0xffff
00001e  ea023203          AND      r2,r2,r3,LSL #12
000022  4322              ORRS     r2,r2,r4
;;;7623   
;;;7624     /* Select the Polarity and set the CC2E Bit */
;;;7625     tmpccer &= ~(TIM_CCER_CC2P | TIM_CCER_CC2NP);
;;;7626     tmpccer |= ((TIM_ICPolarity << 4U) & (TIM_CCER_CC2P | TIM_CCER_CC2NP));
000024  24a0              MOVS     r4,#0xa0
000026  f02503a0          BIC      r3,r5,#0xa0           ;7625
00002a  ea041101          AND      r1,r4,r1,LSL #4
00002e  4319              ORRS     r1,r1,r3
;;;7627   
;;;7628     /* Write to TIMx CCMR1 and CCER registers */
;;;7629     TIMx->CCMR1 = tmpccmr1 ;
000030  6182              STR      r2,[r0,#0x18]
;;;7630     TIMx->CCER = tmpccer;
000032  6201              STR      r1,[r0,#0x20]
;;;7631   }
000034  bd30              POP      {r4,r5,pc}
;;;7632   
                          ENDP
